title: ICMR Standard Treatment Workflows (STWs)
publisher: Indian Council of Medical Research / Government of India
quality_gate: Every answer using this source must cite document title/URL and include missing-data, contraindication, monitoring, and escalation language for doctor mode.

title: ICMR Guidelines and Consensus Documents
publisher: Indian Council of Medical Research / Government of India
quality_gate: Doctor answers must explicitly check diagnosis, local resistance/guideline fit, allergies, pregnancy/lactation, renal/hepatic function, interactions, and review timing.

title: ICMR-NIN Dietary Guidelines for Indians
quality_gate: Patient answers may discuss diet/lifestyle and red flags, but must not replace clinician-prescribed diet plans for CKD, pregnancy complications, diabetes medication adjustment, or severe illness.

title: NCDC Technical Guidelines and Public Health Resources
publisher: National Centre for Disease Control / Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
quality_gate: Seasonal answers must include geography/date caveat, urgent danger signs, and public-health testing/reporting recommendations when relevant.

title: Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme (IDSP)
publisher: Integrated Disease Surveillance Programme / Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
quality_gate: Responses must distinguish patient-specific diagnosis from aggregate surveillance and should never claim a local outbreak unless a dated source supports it.

title: CDSCO Drug Regulatory Sources
publisher: Central Drugs Standard Control Organisation / Government of India
quality_gate: Prescription answers must use generic names, check Schedule H/prescription-only boundaries, contraindications, interactions, pregnancy/lactation, renal/hepatic status, and CDSCO alerts when relevant.

title: PM-JAY Health Benefit Packages and NHA Documents
publisher: National Health Authority / Government of India
quality_gate: Keep clinical necessity separate from package eligibility and mark final insurance approval as payer/admin workflow.
